name: RBL World Safari Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 6X Reward Points on all international transactions
4X Reward Points on domestic travel bookings
2 Reward Points per ₹100 on all other purchases

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: Priority Pass membership for international lounge access
6X rewards on international spends - great for travellers
Concierge services for travel and lifestyle needs
pros: Excellent lounge access with 12 domestic + 4 international visits
cons: Annual fee of ₹3,000 requires decent spend to justify
RBL has limited physical presence compared to top banks
Point value could be higher for this price tier
idealFor: Frequent international travellers seeking strong lounge access
Users who spend heavily on international transactions

faqs.question: How many lounge visits are included?
faqs.answer: You get 12 complimentary domestic and 4 international lounge visits per year via Priority Pass.

faqs.question: Is the foreign currency markup competitive?
faqs.answer: Yes, at 2% the markup is among the lower options in this segment, making it good for international travel and online foreign purchases.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹3,000 annual fee is waived on spending ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year.
